title: Computer Parts and Devices Practice Test

questions.questionText: What do we use to type letters and numbers on a computer?
questions.explanation: The keyboard is used for typing.

questions.questionText: Which part of the computer displays pictures and text?
questions.explanation: The monitor displays what we see.

questions.questionText: What do we use to point and click on items on the screen?
questions.explanation: The mouse is used to point and click.

questions.questionText: Which part of the computer does all the thinking and calculations?
questions.explanation: The CPU is like the brain of the computer.

questions.questionText: What do the letters CPU mean?
questions.explanation: CPU means Central Processing Unit.

questions.questionText: Which device helps us hear sounds from the computer?
questions.explanation: Speakers play sound.

questions.questionText: Which of these is a portable computer?
questions.explanation: A laptop is a portable computer.

questions.questionText: What is often called the brain of the computer?
questions.explanation: The CPU is like the brain.

questions.questionText: Which device do we use to print on paper?
questions.explanation: A printer prints on paper.

questions.questionText: What do we call the main screen when we first start the computer?
questions.explanation: The desktop is the main screen.

questions.questionText: Which part of the computer stores files even when it is turned off?
questions.explanation: The hard disk stores files permanently.

questions.questionText: What is a small picture that represents a program or file?
questions.explanation: Icons are small pictures that represent programs.

questions.questionText: Which device takes paper documents and puts them into the computer?
questions.explanation: A scanner copies documents into the computer.

questions.questionText: What do we use to connect a computer to the internet?
questions.explanation: Modem or WiFi connects to the internet.

questions.questionText: What do we call a USB drive used for?
questions.explanation: USB drives store files that we can carry.

questions.questionText: Which part of the computer shows what we type?
questions.explanation: The monitor displays the output.

questions.questionText: What do we call the bar at the top of a window that shows its name?
questions.explanation: The title bar shows the window name.

questions.questionText: Which key makes all letters appear in uppercase?
questions.explanation: Caps Lock makes uppercase letters.

questions.questionText: What is a blinking line that shows where we will type?
questions.explanation: The cursor shows where we are typing.

questions.questionText: Which key do we press to go to the next line when typing?
questions.explanation: Enter creates a new line.

questions.questionText: What is a list of options in a program?
questions.explanation: A menu shows options we can choose.

questions.questionText: Which key do we hold down to type a capital letter?
questions.explanation: Shift helps type capital letters.

questions.questionText: What is a picture or icon that opens a program quickly?
questions.explanation: A shortcut opens a program quickly.

questions.questionText: Which key cancels an action or closes a dialog?
questions.explanation: Escape cancels or closes.

questions.questionText: What do we call a place that holds many files?
questions.explanation: A folder holds files.
